nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI operating autonomously without human control
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do it together, but under my direction

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI for writing and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: mostly research and organization, looking for ideas or sorting tasks

nodes.label: AI reliability and access to saved work
nodes.grounding_span: the AI servers wouldn't connect and i couldn't access my saved conversations

nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool for generative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: ai is pretty good at summarizing, analyzing, and extracting

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: my ideas already exist, and i prefer expressing them in my own voice

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: creative motivation can't simple be switched on, it takes a lot of work to build up and maintain momentum

nodes.label: Understanding and awareness of AI capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: they should be aware of it's abilities (and that it exists) so they can more easily identify it or what it creates

nodes.label: Preference for collaboration over delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do it together, but under my direction

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: definitely writing, i don't need an ai to write for me

nodes.label: Frustration and loss of trust due to server outage
nodes.grounding_span: major interruption to productivity and completely soul crushing

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: i envision myself experimenting more with generative capabilities, while continuing to see ai as a partner for assistance and collaboration

nodes.label: Preference for structured collaboration under own direction
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do it together, but under my direction

nodes.label: Momentum-dependent creative workflow
nodes.grounding_span: creative motivation can't simple be switched on, it takes a lot of work to build up and maintain momentum
